title: Deploy application to Internet Computer mainnet

requirements.text: Configure the project for mainnet deployment by ensuring dfx.json contains production-ready canister configurations with mainnet network settings
acceptanceCriteria: Canister settings are optimized for production (cycles, memory allocation)
Frontend canister serves optimized production build

requirements.text: Build and deploy the backend canister (main.mo) to the Internet Computer mainnet with proper cycles funding
acceptanceCriteria: Backend canister is deployed and running on mainnet
Canister has sufficient cycles for operation
Canister ID is documented for frontend integration

requirements.text: Build the frontend application in production mode with environment variables pointing to mainnet backend canister, then deploy the optimized static assets to the Internet Computer frontend canister
acceptanceCriteria: Frontend is built with production optimizations (minification, tree-shaking)
Environment variables reference mainnet canister IDs
Frontend canister serves the application with proper asset certification
Application is accessible via public Internet Computer URL

requirements.text: Verify Internet Identity integration works correctly on mainnet by testing authentication flow with production Internet Identity canister
acceptanceCriteria: Users can authenticate using Internet Identity on mainnet
useInternetIdentity hook connects to production II canister

requirements.text: Test all core application functionality on mainnet including onboarding survey, quest creation/completion, streak tracking, skill progression, boss challenges, and achievement unlocking to ensure localStorage persistence works correctly in production
acceptanceCriteria: Onboarding survey completes and generates personalized quests
Quests can be created, edited, and marked complete
XP awards correctly and triggers rank progression
All localStorage operations function on mainnet

constraints: Deployment must target Internet Computer mainnet, not local replica or testnets
Do not modify immutable frontend paths during deployment
Preserve all localStorage-based state management (no backend state migration required)
nonGoals: Backend data persistence (app uses localStorage exclusively)
